news.t: Pacific AM launches its first Emerging Market Equities Active ETF

holdings.infoBox: GEME is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Pacific North of South EM Equity Active ETF (GEME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of emerging market equity and equity-related securities of large- and mid-cap companies. The fund employs a value-based investment approach that combines company-specific research with macroeconomic trend analysis. GEME was launched on Jan 23, 2025 and is issued by Pacific Funds.

holdings.n: Samsung Electronics Co Ltd Participating Preferred

data.title: Pacific AM launches its first Emerging Market Equities Active ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacific AM launches GEME ETF, provides investors with actively managed, concentrated, value-orientated portfolio of large- and mid-cap EM equities.
